notes:
I've designed the "Docs-meets-Marketing" page for MONOLITH_OS, which you can see on the canvas.

This design implements:
- **Strict IBM-Inspired Grid:** Ensuring high information density and structural alignment.
- **Modular Content Rails:** Bridging high-level solution value with deep technical documentation.
- **Architectural Specs Section:** Including a capabilities matrix for technical clarity.
- **Code-Snippet Highlights:** Using technical visual cues for the "Immutable Kernel Engine."
- **Side Navigation Hierarchy:** For quick access to documentation paths.

The layout is designed to feel precise, authoritative, and efficient, reflecting a high-performance enterprise system.
prompt: Design a docs-meets-marketing page in an IBM-inspired enterprise system. Use a strict grid, clear information density, exact headings, modular content rails, and minimal motion. The page should bridge solution marketing and technical documentation without losing structure.
suggestions: Add a "Live API Playground" section to this page
Create a dedicated "Developer Resources" dashboard in the same style
Design a dark mode version of this documentation page
title: MONOLITH_OS Documentation & Solutions
